title: litsea albida
intro: Litsea albida, also known as white angelica or Chinese angelica, is a plant species that belongs to the Litsea genus. It is a flowering plant native to China and Southeast Asia, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Litsea albida include reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Litsea albida can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or decoction, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its therapeutic effects.
